folio.label: 70v
folio.l: Spones stoles , and al swiche husbondrye
And so ben pottes , clothes and array
But men of wommen , maken noon assay
Til they ben wedded , olde doted shrewe
And than~e seist æè , we wol oure vices shewe
Thow seist also , that it displesetú me
But if æat æè wylt preyse , my beaute
And but thow poure , alwey invp oninvp on my face
And clepe me fair dame , in euäy place
And but thow make a feest , on thilke day
That I was bornö , and make me fressú and gay
And but thow do , to my norice honour
And to my chaumberer , witú Inne my boure
And to my fadres folk , and hise allies
Thus seist æè olde barel , ful of lyes
And ©et of oure p p Apprentys , Iankyn
For his crispe heer shynynge , as gold fyn
And for he squyeretú me , vp and doun
ñet hast æè caugút / a fals suspeciouö
I wol hi~ nougút , thougú æè were ded to morwe
But telle me æis why , hidest thow witú sorwe
The keyes of thy chest , a wey fro me
It is my good , as wel as thyn , parde
What wenest thow , to make an Idiote of oure dame
Now by that lord , that cleped is Seynt Iame
Thow shalt nat bothe , thougú æat æè were wood
Be maistre of my body , and of my good
That oon æè shalt for gon , maugre thyne eyen
What nedetú the of me , to enqueren & spyen
I trowe æè woldest lokke me , in thy cheste
Thow shuldest seye good wyf , go where the liste
Taketú ©oure disport , I wol nat leue no tales
I knowe ©ow for a trewe wyf , Dame Alys
We loue noman , that taketú kep~ or charge
Where æat we goo , we wol be at oure large
Of alle men , I blessed mot he be
The wyse Astrologien , Dan Protholomee
That seitú this ¸uerbe , in his almagest
Of alle men , his wysdom is heyest
That rekketú nat , who hatú the world in honde
By this prouerbe , æè shalt vnderstonde
Haue thow I now , what thar the rekke or care
How merily , that othere folkes fare
For certes olde dotard , be ©oure leue
